LifeXP.name: LifeXP
LifeXP.description: An AI-powered personal growth platform designed to help users transform goals into consistent habits.
LifeXP.problem: People set goals but fail to build consistent habits. Generic tracking apps lack personalization and intelligent feedback loops.
LifeXP.solution: Built a full-stack platform combining habit tracking with AI-driven recommendations. The system learns from user patterns and adapts suggestions over time.
LifeXP.challenges: Designing a scalable user tracking system without premature optimization. Balancing AI inference costs with real-time responsiveness.
LifeXP.lessonsLearned: Start with the simplest data model that works. AI features should enhance the core experience, not replace it.

fraud-detection-framework.name: Fraud Detection Framework
fraud-detection-framework.description: Machine learning pipeline for identifying fraudulent transactions in financial datasets using ensemble methods.
fraud-detection-framework.problem: Financial institutions lose billions to fraud annually. Traditional rule-based systems miss novel attack patterns and generate excessive false positives.
fraud-detection-framework.solution: Engineered an ML pipeline using ensemble methods (Random Forest, XGBoost, isolation forests) with feature engineering tailored to transaction behavior patterns.
fraud-detection-framework.architecture: Data Ingestion -> Feature Engineering -> ML Pipeline -> Evaluation -> Alerts
fraud-detection-framework.challenges: Handling extreme class imbalance in fraud datasets. Only 0.17% of transactions were fraudulent, requiring careful sampling strategies.
fraud-detection-framework.lessonsLearned: Domain knowledge matters more than model complexity. Feature engineering on transaction velocity and time-based patterns outperformed deep learning approaches.

weapon-detection-system.name: Weapon Detection System
weapon-detection-system.description: Real-time computer vision system for detecting weapons in video feeds using deep learning object detection.
weapon-detection-system.problem: Security monitoring relies on human operators watching multiple feeds simultaneously, leading to missed threats and slow response times.
weapon-detection-system.solution: Built a real-time detection pipeline using YOLO-based object detection, trained on custom weapon datasets with data augmentation for edge cases.
weapon-detection-system.architecture: Camera Feed -> Frame Processing -> YOLO Model -> Alert System -> Dashboard
weapon-detection-system.challenges: Achieving reliable detection under varying lighting conditions and camera angles. Reducing false positives from objects that visually resemble weapons.
weapon-detection-system.lessonsLearned: Data quality and augmentation strategy matters far more than model architecture for real-world computer vision deployments.

disaster-relief-app.name: Disaster Relief App
disaster-relief-app.description: Mobile-first application connecting disaster-affected communities with relief resources and volunteer coordination.
disaster-relief-app.problem: During disasters, affected communities struggle to find resources while relief organizations lack real-time ground truth data for effective deployment.
disaster-relief-app.solution: Created a geolocation-based platform that matches resource requests with nearby volunteers and NGOs, with real-time status tracking and priority routing.
disaster-relief-app.architecture: Mobile App -> API Gateway -> Node.js Backend -> MongoDB -> Maps API
disaster-relief-app.challenges: Designing for unreliable network conditions in disaster zones. Building offline-first data sync that works on low-bandwidth connections.
disaster-relief-app.lessonsLearned: Build for the worst-case scenario first. Offline capability and low-bandwidth optimization should be core architecture decisions, not afterthoughts.
